notes: Essential HQ choice for buffing nearby Skitarii units. Consider using the Warlord trait 'Programmatic Strategist'.

abilities.name: Lords of the Mechanicus
abilities.description: Once per battle, at the start of your Command phase, this model can use this ability. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time a friendly Adeptus Mechanicus unit within 6" of this model makes an attack, re-roll a hit roll of 1.

notes: Skitarii Rangers are the backbone of the Adeptus Mechanicus army, providing scoring and mid-range firepower.
